github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This is a .NET MAUI 9 project targeting Android phones and Wear OS (OnePlus Watch 3). Use CommunityToolkit.Mvvm 8.4.0 with [ObservableProperty] and [RelayCommand] source generators. Guard WearOS code with #if WEAR_OS and Android code with #if ANDROID. Use Plugin.BLE 3.2.0 for Bluetooth. All async methods must accept CancellationToken.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: There are currently no unit tests in this project. If adding tests, create a new project DistanceAlarm.Tests/ with xUnit. Mock IBluetoothService, IAlarmService, ILocationService, and IPermissionService using NSubstitute or Moq. Test ViewModels by exercising commands and asserting observable property changes.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: When reviewing code in this .NET MAUI project: check for missing #if WEAR_OS / #if ANDROID guards, missing CancellationToken parameters, ObservableProperty/RelayCommand usage, Android API-level guards (Build.VERSION.SdkInt), correct BLE permission handling (BluetoothPermissions on API 31+), and MainThread.BeginInvokeOnMainThread for UI updates from service events.
